# PERF-98 negative: redis commands batched via rdb.Pipeline()
lang: go
file: PERF-098-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
)

func SetAll(ctx context.Context, rdb *redis.Client, keys []string) error {
	pipe := rdb.Pipeline()
	for _, k := range keys {
		pipe.Set(ctx, k, "1", 0)
	}
	_, err := pipe.Exec(ctx)
	return err
}
